scripts.test:integration: docker build -t @lightscope-ce/clickhouse-test -f Dockerfile . && docker run -d --name clickhouse-integration-test -p 8123:8123 -p 9000:9000 -e CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME=lightscope -e CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=lightscope -e CLICKHOUSE_DB=lightscope --ulimit nofile=262144:262144 @lightscope-ce/clickhouse-test && WAIT_PORTS=8123 node ../../utils/wait-for-services.js && vitest run integration ; docker rm -f clickhouse-integration-test
